name: There's An AI For That (TAAFT)
notes: Largest AI tool aggregator — 80M+ users, 2.5M newsletter subscribers. Free submissions accepted, manually reviewed by staff. Also offers paid featured listings via https://theresanaiforthat.com/get-featured/. Better AI-targeting than Product Hunt. Submission also gets newsletter mention.

name: The Rundown AI
notes: 2M+ subscribers, 50.2% open rate, 46% C-suite/founders. Free tool submission form at /submit. Paid sponsorship via https://sponsor.therundown.ai/ — fill form and receive custom package in 24h. Sponsored tools get permanent page on AI tool database (200k monthly views).

name: Ben's Bites
notes: 100k+ subscribers, focused on AI builders and startups. Create an account at news.bensbites.com and submit a post — top-voted posts get featured in the daily newsletter. Community-driven discovery model. Also reachable via X @bensbites.

name: ZPlatform.ai
notes: 25,000+ active AI deal hunters, marketers, developers. Submit via form with tool name, URL, description, and email. Expert review process evaluates UX, quality, value. Free basic listing available; featured listing includes in-depth review, newsletter promotion, and social media exposure.

name: Product Hunt
notes: The go-to launch platform for tech products. Create account, schedule launch with description/images/video. Community upvoting drives visibility — a strong launch can drive thousands of visits in a day. Free to submit. Best to launch on Tuesday-Thursday for maximum engagement. Tag with AI/SaaS categories.
